name: Worm Rakuyeh
desc: This card can only declare an attack the turn it was flipped face-up. If this card attacks, it is changed to face-down Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase.<!-- Please, do not change this text to the one found in the card database under Hidden Arsenal 2 as many of them have their old text instead of the latest text. -->
